action.reasoning: Observation: DPRNN PESQ=2.52, all custom models worse than MetricGAN+ baseline (3.134). Analysis: Pre-trained MetricGAN+ is hard to beat with limited training. Decision: Try post-processing MetricGAN+ output with signal processing techniques (spectral gating, Wiener filtering) to improve PESQ. Also try ensemble of MetricGAN+ with CRN.
